import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let haystack = io.read_line().ok_or("no haystack")?
  let needle = io.read_line().ok_or("no needle")?

  let needle_byte = string.byte_at(needle, 0).ok_or("empty needle")?

  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let len = string.len(haystack)
  while i < len
    let b = match string.byte_at(haystack, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == needle_byte
      count = count + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print("count=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
